note: Placeholder gallery. Replace each item's src/poster with real SGLang-Diffusion output in docs/gallery/, and edit prompt/model/params. type=image -> ; type=video ->

items.prompt: A weathered brass diving helmet resting on raw linen, soft north-window light — a quiet still life in the spirit of 1950s editorial photography.
An abandoned Art Nouveau conservatory reclaimed by ferns and morning mist, light falling through a cracked glass roof.
A lone heron lifts from a glass-still lake at first light, slow motion, mist peeling off the water.
Studio portrait of an old jazz guitarist mid-phrase, a single warm key light, the grain of Kodak Portra 400.
An Art-Deco travel poster of the Zhejiang coastline — geometric waves, cream and burnt orange, screen-printed texture.
A paper boat drifting down a rain-slick gutter through fallen ginkgo leaves, shallow depth of field.
A warehouse robot pauses to watch dust drift through a single shaft of late-afternoon light.
Wind moving in long waves across a golden barley field at dusk, anamorphic lens, soft flare.
